title: AntiError
description: A font pack that brings accessibility to dyslexic people
body:
# AntiError
A Texture Pack (font pack type) for JE with Caxton mod installed.

The one Texture Pack that brings accessibility to minecraft! (specifically, it's for dyslexic people)

~~some foreshadowing...~~

Screenshots:
